title: SR 21-6 / CA 21-4: CA 21-4: Highlighting the Federal Reserve System's Partnership for Progress Program for Minority Depository Institutions and Women's Depository Institutions
title_normalized: CA 21-4: Highlighting the Federal Reserve System's Partnership for Progress Program for Minority Depository Institutions and Women's Depository Institutions
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Supervision and Regulation > SR Letters > SR 21-6 / CA 21-4
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
applicability_raw: This letter only applies to minority depository institutions and women’s depository institutions (each as defined in this letter) that are subject to Federal Reserve System supervision.

I.  Overview and Organizational Structure of the PFP Program
V.  MDI and WDI Designation Process
VI.  Engagement with MDIs and WDIs
bm25_text: SR 21-6 / CA 21-4 CA 21-4: Highlighting the Federal Reserve System's Partnership for Progress Program for Minority Depository Institutions and Women's Depository Institutions This letter only applies to minority depository institutions and women’s depository institutions (each as defined in this letter) that are subject to Federal Reserve System supervision.
